#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
--IMPORT_SPLIT--

/**
 * @brief Calculates the minimum number of insertions to sort an array.
 * 
 * The problem is equivalent to finding the length of the longest non-decreasing
 * subsequence (LIS). The elements that are part of the LIS can remain in their
 * positions, while the other elements must be moved (inserted) to their correct
 * sorted positions.
 * 
 * Therefore, the minimum number of insertions is N - length(LIS).
 * 
 * @
